name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-6
title: SKILL.md references slash commands /rabbit-file file|work|list that do not exist as harness commands
description: SKILL.md documents '/rabbit-file file bug', '/rabbit-file work backlog <ID>', '/rabbit-file list ...' as invocation surface, but no corresponding slash-command wrapper exists - users actually run python3 file-item.py / item-status.py / list-items.py. The skill's 'Work Protocol' step 5 shell snippet uses '' that is never defined in the snippet. Either implement /rabbit-file wrapper commands (per feature.json 'commands: []' currently empty) or update SKILL.md to remove the slash command surface and show direct python invocations consistently.
